title: PhD Positions in Responsible AI
optional_docs: other: fill out this form (optional but encouraged)
eligibility: Must have a Master’s degree (completed or near completion) in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Mathematics, Physics, Statistics, or a related quantitative field.
Must have a solid background in machine learning, statistics and/or mathematics.
Must have strong programming skills in Python.
Must have excellent command of written and spoken English.
notes: The employment duration is initially limited to 1.5 years, automatically extending to 3 years if not terminated within the first 12 months.
